description: Systematic claim-by-claim grading of all assertions in the seed hypothesis
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib
matplotlib.rcParams['font.size'] = 8

# Systematic claim grading
claims = [
    # (Claim, Status, Evidence Summary, Key refs)
    ("H/K ATPase is the primary\nautoantigen in AIG", "ESTABLISHED", "Concordant murine models (TxA23, d3Tx)\n+ human autoantibody + ARIOSO consensus", "PMID:11449363\nPMID:41198445"),
    ("CD4+ T cells are necessary\nand sufficient for disease", "ESTABLISHED", "TxA23 100% penetrance; CD4 transfer\nexperiments; MHC-II restriction", "PMID:11449363\nPMID:8759770"),
    ("Beta subunit (ATP4B) is the\ndominant T-cell target", "ESTABLISHED", "Thymic beta expression prevents disease;\nARIOSO consensus; TCR transgenic data", "PMID:8393475\nPMID:41198445"),
    ("Alpha thymic expression\npartially tolerizes", "CONTRADICTED", "Alpha mRNA does NOT result in negative\nselection; protein can't access MHC-II", "PMID:16237067\nPMID:16214318"),
    ("Disease is purely primary\n(infection-independent)", "CONTRADICTED", "H. pylori mimicry, roseolovirus thymic\ndisruption, H.p.→AIG post-eradication", "PMID:14568977\nPMID:35226043"),
    ("Disease is self-sustaining\nonce established", "ESTABLISHED", "AIG persists/progresses after H. pylori\neradication; TCR transgenic spontaneous", "PMID:40769905\nPMID:38072907"),
    ("Central tolerance breakdown\nis the primary cause", "EMERGING\n(QUALIFIED)", "True for AIRE/APECED; but peripheral\ntolerance loss also sufficient (IPEX, ICI)", "PMID:23314667\nPMID:29907148"),
    ("Monogenic defects (AIRE,\nFOXP3) cause AIG", "ESTABLISHED", "25% of APECED have atrophic gastritis;\nIPEX case with metaplastic atrophic gastritis", "PMID:23314667\nPMID:29907148"),
    ("Disease is Th1-mediated", "QUALIFIED", "Th1/Th2/Th17 all cause disease;\nTh17 most destructive; both IFN-γ + IL-17\nneeded for severe disease", "PMID:18641328\nPMID:22777705"),
    ("Autoantibodies are markers\nnot primary mediators", "EMERGING", "20% seronegative AIG supports T-cell\nprimacy; but synergistic humoral role\nacknowledged (2026 review)", "PMID:32487505\nPMID:41670890"),
    ("Genetic susceptibility involves\nHLA and autoimmune loci", "ESTABLISHED", "GWAS: PTPN22, HLA, ABO, IFIH1;\nheritability 71-95%", "PMID:34145262\nPMID:21829393"),
    ("Chief cells/pepsinogen are\nalso autoimmune targets", "EMERGING", "Anti-pepsinogen in 100% PA sera (1989);\nnot systematically followed up with\nmodern T-cell studies", "PMID:2528890"),
]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(18, 11))
ax.axis('off')

columns = ['Claim from Hypothesis', 'Grading', 'Evidence Summary', 'Key References']
cell_text = []
cell_colors = []

status_colors = {
    'ESTABLISHED': '#d4edda',
    'CONTRADICTED': '#f8d7da', 
    'EMERGING': '#fff3cd',
    'EMERGING\n(QUALIFIED)': '#fff3cd',
    'QUALIFIED': '#cce5ff',
    'SPECULATIVE': '#e2e3e5',
}

for claim, status, evidence, refs in claims:
    cell_text.append([claim, status, evidence, refs])
    color = status_colors.get(status, '#ffffff')
    cell_colors.append([color]*4)

table = ax.table(cellText=cell_text, colLabels=columns, cellColours=cell_colors,
                 colColours=['#343a40']*4, loc='center', cellLoc='center')

for (row, col), cell in table.get_celld().items():
    if row == 0:
        cell.set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold', fontsize=8)
        cell.set_height(0.05)
    else:
        cell.set_text_props(fontsize=7)
        cell.set_height(0.075)
    cell.set_edgecolor('#dee2e6')

table.auto_set_column_width(col=list(range(4)))

plt.title('Systematic Claim Grading: Canonical Primary Autoimmunity Against H+/K+ ATPase\n'
          'Green=Established  Blue=Qualified  Yellow=Emerging  Red=Contradicted', 
          fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', pad=20)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('claim_grading.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Claim grading table saved.")
